bodyText:
What is company registration consultant? Expert company registration consultant — Pvt Ltd, LLP, OPC, Section 8, Nidhi Company. End-to-end MCA filing support.
Company Registration Consultant is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Delhi, Delhi since 2012.
Quick Answer: Company Registration in Delhi — Expert company registration consultant — Pvt Ltd, LLP, OPC, Section 8, Nidhi Company. End-to-end MCA. From ₹5,999. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Company Registration Consultant in Delhi
Virtual Auditor provides company registration consultant across Delhi. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Delhi with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Delhi handles company registrations and filings for Delhi. Stamp duty: As per Delhi schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable.

• Private Limited Company Registration

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Delhi
Our founder CA V. Viswanathan holds four credentials — FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV — which means your company registration is handled by the same qualified professional, not a rotating cast of junior associates.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: Which entity type is best for my business?
faqs.a: Pvt Ltd for funding, LLP for professionals, OPC for solo entrepreneurs, Section 8 for non-profit. We advise based on your specific goals.

faqs.q: What is the cheapest company to register?
faqs.a: Sole proprietorship (₹0 registration fee) or LLP (from ₹5,999). Pvt Ltd from ₹8,999 all-inclusive.

faqs.q: Can NRIs register a company in India?
faqs.a: Yes. NRIs can be directors and shareholders. At least one director must be an Indian resident (182+ days in India).

faqs.q: Do you provide company registration services in Delhi?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Delhi from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Delhi?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Delhi fall under ROC Delhi. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Delhi-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Delhi?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Delhi: As per Delhi schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
